nasb.text: One thing I have asked from the Lord, that I shall seek: That I may dwell in the house of the Lord all the days of my life, To behold the beauty of the Lord And to meditate in His temple.

esv.text: One thing have I asked of the Lord, that will I seek after: that I may dwell in the house of the Lord all the days of my life, to gaze upon the beauty of the Lord and to inquire in his temple.

cnv.text: 有一件事我求過耶和華，我還要尋求； 我要一生一世住在耶和華的殿裡， 瞻仰他的榮美，在他的殿中求問。

ccb.text: 我曾向耶和华求一件事， 我还要求，就是能一生住在祂的殿中， 瞻仰祂的荣美，寻求祂的旨意。

csbs.text: 有一件事我求过耶和华， 这件事我还要求问， 就是在我一生所有的日子里，可以居住在耶和华的殿中， 仰望耶和华的恩慈，在他的圣殿中寻求；
